CustomField.formula: and( RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Surgeries', ispickval( Appointment_Status__c, 'WaitingForAppointment'), not(isblank( Spincal__c )), not(Message_24h_before_surgery__c ), if( WEEKDAY( Appointment_Date__c ) = 1 && Appointment_Date__c - 3 = today(), true, if( WEEKDAY( Appointment_Date__c ) <> 1 && Appointment_Date__c - 1 = today(), true, false )))
CustomField.label: Need to send sms before surgery
